name: multi-field-atom-brick-allocator-on
description: Wave 1 / E1 Step 7 — multi-field-three-atlas-atoms regression. Multi-Field scene rendered through the per-atom brick path (the shipping atlas path as of Step 8d's default flip and Step 9's kill-switch retirement). Each atom owns its own brick at any shared cell via the multi-slot per-cell list — fixes the multi-field-three-spheres last-write-wins bug from before Wave 1.
